title: Nocterna - The Source of Magic
snippet: In the year 429 EP (Exodus Prior), an unnamed wizard of the great elven city-state of Althier discovered the prismatic wall. When the casting was complete, a great darkness fell over the city, as its denizen looked up in despair - for the Light had vanished without a trace. Within a matter of day...

title: Nocterna - The Darkened Realm
snippet: A farmer awakes in the small village of Dawnmill, due east of the capital. He opens his windows and is greeted by a soft, orange glow, not that of the sun, but of the Light: a massive web of dancing lights that cover all the night skies. The orange aurora indicates the warm season continues. Amid...
